data.title: Rate Limiting
data.description: Prevents abuse of the platform by limiting the number of requests a user can make in a given time.
data.technical_spec: Implemented via API management services with custom rate limiting rules.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Enhances account security by requiring a second verification step during login.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS and authentication apps for second-factor authentication.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protects user communications by encrypting messages across the Instagram platform.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes advanced encryption standards (AES) for message and data privacy.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Monitors and filters HTTP requests to defend against common web exploits.
data.technical_spec: Integrated with existing infrastructure to filter malicious traffic.

data.title: User Data Anonymization
data.description: Anonymizes personal user data to enhance privacy protection.
data.technical_spec: Uses techniques like hashing and tokenization for personal data.
